title: Saveetha College of Pharmacy collaboration with IPGA organized a webinar titled Pharmacy – World of Opportunities
summary: Saveetha College of Pharmacy (SIMATS), Chennai, jointly in collaboration with the Indian Pharmaceutical Graduates' Association (IPGA) successfully organized a webinar titled “Pharmacy – World of Opportunities” on May 4, 2026.
thbAction: Position THB's pharma CRM and omnichannel HCP engagement workflows to support launch planning, KAM orchestration, and compliant follow-up across India and the Middle East.
contentHtml:
Saveetha College of Pharmacy (SIMATS), Chennai, jointly in collaboration with the Indian Pharmaceutical Graduates' Association (IPGA) successfully organized a webinar titled “Pharmacy – World of Opportunities” on May 4, 2026. 

The session primarily focused on career opportunities in the specialized domain of Drug Safety and Pharmacovigilance. Shri. Vijayabhaskar Reddy Annapareddy, reputed, renowned, global pharmacy leader and highly qualified pharmacovigilance expert, as resource person highlighted the critical role of pharmacovigilance in ensuring patient safety through the detection, assessment, understanding, and prevention of adverse drug reactions. Emphasis was placed on the growing demand for skilled professionals in areas such as adverse event reporting, signal detection, risk management, and regulatory compliance.

Shri. Vijayabhaskar Reddy Annapareddy as subject expert provided insights into career pathways within pharmaceutical companies, contract research organizations (CROs), and regulatory agencies. Sir also discussed essential competencies required in this field, including data analysis, clinical knowledge, regulatory awareness, and proficiency in pharmacovigilance databases.An interactive session enabled participants to clarify queries related to training, certifications, and career progression in drug safety. The webinar witnessed active participation from students and professionals, making it a valuable platform for focused career guidance.

The program concluded with a vote of thanks by Dr. Rathinavelu Mohanraj (EC Member IPA Hospital Pharmacy Division and Associate Professor, DoPP, Saveetha College of Pharmacy (SIMATS), Chennai; acknowledging all contributors. Overall, the webinar effectively highlighted Drug Safety and Pharmacovigilance as a promising and impactful career pathway in pharmacy.
